items.title_zh: 作为新的人工智能合作伙伴关系的一部分，谷歌投资了独立电影制片厂 A24；消息人士称，谷歌正在投资约 7500 万美元，大致相当于 Thrive 2024 年的投资（Ben Fritz/华尔街日报）

items.title_original: Upscale, which is building AI networking infrastructure to rival Cisco, raised a $190M Series A-1 at a $2B valuation, up from $1B after raising $200M in January (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_en: Upscale, which is building AI networking infrastructure to rival Cisco, raised a $190M Series A-1 at a $2B valuation, up from $1B after raising $200M in January (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_zh: Upscale 正在构建人工智能网络基础设施以与思科竞争，该公司在 1 月份筹集了 2 亿美元后，以 20 亿美元的估值筹集了 1.9 亿美元的 A-1 轮融资，估值高于 10 亿美元（Lily Mae Lazarus/财富）

items.title_original: Nvidia unveils Halos, a safety-focused OS developed from autonomous vehicle tech and designed to run on IGX Thor hardware for humanoid robots, and opens a lab (Ian King/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Nvidia unveils Halos, a safety-focused OS developed from autonomous vehicle tech and designed to run on IGX Thor hardware for humanoid robots, and opens a lab (Ian King/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: Nvidia 推出 Halos，这是一款基于自动驾驶汽车技术开发的注重安全的操作系统，旨在在人形机器人的 IGX Thor 硬​​件上运行，并开设了一个实验室（Ian King/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia 推出 Halos，这是一款基于自动驾驶汽车技术开发的注重安全的操作系统，旨在在人形机器人的 IGX Thor 硬​​件上运行，并开设了一个实验室（Ian King/彭博社） / Nvidia unveils Halos, a safety-focused OS developed from autonomous vehicle tech and designed to run on IGX Thor hardware for humanoid robots, and opens a lab (Ian King/Bloomberg)

items.title: In a rare joint statement, Five Eyes leaders warn AI models capable of taking down governments and businesses are mere months away, urging leaders to "act now" (Sarah Basford Canales/The Guardian)
items.title_original: In a rare joint statement, Five Eyes leaders warn AI models capable of taking down governments and businesses are mere months away, urging leaders to "act now" (Sarah Basford Canales/The Guardian)
items.title_en: In a rare joint statement, Five Eyes leaders warn AI models capable of taking down governments and businesses are mere months away, urging leaders to "act now" (Sarah Basford Canales/The Guardian)
items.title_zh: 在一份罕见的联合声明中，五眼联盟领导人警告说，只需几个月的时间，人工智能模型就能推翻政府和企业，并敦促领导人“立即采取行动”（莎拉·巴斯福德·卡纳莱斯/卫报）
items.title_bilingual: 在一份罕见的联合声明中，五眼联盟领导人警告说，只需几个月的时间，人工智能模型就能推翻政府和企业，并敦促领导人“立即采取行动”（莎拉·巴斯福德·卡纳莱斯/卫报） / In a rare joint statement, Five Eyes leaders warn AI models capable of taking down governments and businesses are mere months away, urging leaders to "act now" (Sarah Basford Canales/The Guardian)
